title: Installing Girlfriend of Steel
wikitext:
[]: Installing Girlfriend of Steel             Quote Post by BlueJacketGuy » Sat Jul 12, 2014 4:34 pm Well, Im installing this VN and Im getting issues with it not playing audio and the textbmp files keep saying they can't be found. Also it keeps popping up dirpack2::Read seek error. No subtitles or audio and pop ups all throughout. What do?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 12, 2014 6:32 pm This the 2nd game or the first one? Here's the install tips I saved from years ago (2009 or so): For the first one (fansubbed version), I just copy/pasted everything into a new folder and then it worked, but try this maybe: GoS1 wrote: I had some trouble installing it too. My advice: just copy the contents of the CD image (or CD if you burned it onto a disc) into a folder on the C drive (C:\) called "eva95", and then go into the folder marked "exec", and find the file called "ADV2.exe". You can also make a shortcut of this file if you want, since it's the file you need to run in order to start the game. If you can get it installed using the actual installation program, then you probably don't need to bother with this procedure. However, when I tried to do a full install, it did not install the files completely, and the game would not run. So I did the copy-past technique and replaced all the files, and then I had the game working with the "official" shortcuts in tact. *Kabegami: Allows you to change the wallpaper in the game

[]:             Quote Post by BlueJacketGuy » Sat Jul 12, 2014 6:51 pm Its the first game, and thanks for the shot at it, but I tried that procedure are got the same results as before.
